evidence_used: corporate_calendar (no near-term catalysts, past earnings all negative)
evidence_missing: primary source corroboration for any catalyst claim
baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: GV exhibits extreme distress fundamentals (negative PE, negative margins -175.69%, negative ROA/ROE, debt/equity 9.46x, current ratio 0.066) paired with a 153% 5-day price spike and 19.5x volume surge. Macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive, mandating strict quality discipline. Wikipedia pageviews show no abnormal attention (8-27 views/day, stable). No news, no sentiment data, no institutional positioning data, no insider activity, no 8-K filings. Information integrity assessment flags low-tier-only evidence (T3 only) and explicitly disallows use_as_primary_signal. The price spike lacks corroboration from alternative data, news, or fundamental improvement. This pattern is consistent with a distressed micro-cap experiencing retail-driven volatility without underlying catalyst or quality support. Insufficient evidence to confirm a durable short thesis; missing alt-data verification blocks the decision. Macro regime caps equity allocation at 20% and mandates strict quality—GV fails quality test decisively.

baseline_solo.reason: GV exhibits extreme distress (negative PE, -175.69% net margin, 9.46x debt/equity, 0.066 current ratio) and a 153% 5-day price spike with 19.5x volume surge. However, alternative data (Wikipedia pageviews) shows no abnormal attention, news is absent, sentiment/ownership data unavailable, and information_integrity_assessment explicitly blocks primary-signal use (T3 only, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false). Macro regime mandates strict quality discipline; GV fails decisively. Insufficient corroboration to confirm a durable short thesis. Missing narrative_price_gap_assessment LLM reasoning and multiple alt-data adapters (fmp_sentiment, sec_13f, github_public) prevents triangulation. Fail-closed per missing-evidence policy.

rule_engine_path: 1. Read envelope: lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false, immutable_decision_flag=true → proceed
2. Assess macro_regime: Overheat/Moderately Restrictive, stress_score=2, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution → strict quality required
3. Evaluate fundamental_snapshot: revenue=3.3M, net_income=-5.9M, net_margin=-175.69%, debt/equity=9.46x, current_ratio=0.066 → extreme distress, fails quality test
4. Check valuation_snapshot: PE=-0.047, PB=0.144, EV/EBITDA=-5.69 → negative metrics, not PIT-safe (TTM) → fails quality test
5. Assess price_snapshot: return_5d_pct=153.4%, relative_volume_vs_20d=19.47x → extreme spike, requires corroboration
6. Check alternative_data_features: wikipedia_pageviews stable (8-27 views/day), no spike; github_public unmapped; fmp_sentiment unavailable → no alt-data corroboration
7. Check news_event_summary: status=data_unavailable, 0 items post-cutoff → no catalyst narrative
8. Check information_integrity_assessment: use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, T3 only, pollution-defense unimplemented → blocks primary-signal use
9. Check sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: status=not_evaluated, skeleton → no ownership/sentiment data
10. Check narrative_price_gap_assessment: status=not_evaluated, agent_internal_pending → no LLM reasoning available
11. Evaluate candidate_type=surge_short: requires corroboration of distress + catalyst + no quality support → corroboration missing (alt-data, news, sentiment all absent/unavailable)

12. Trigger veto: insufficient_evidence (multiple adapters unavailable, narrative_price_gap pending), hard_risk_limit_breached (macro regime strict quality, GV fails), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance (narrative, sentiment, ownership, news all absent), information_integrity_veto (T3 only, primary-signal disallowed)
13. Decision: veto → position_size_pct=0.0, decision=no_trade (fail-closed per missing-evidence policy)
decision_log: T+0: Envelope check — lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false, immutable_decision_flag=true → proceed to analysis
T+1: Macro regime assessment — Overheat/Moderately Restrictive, stress_score=2, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution → strict quality discipline required for any equity position

T+2: Fundamental analysis — revenue=3.3M, net_income=-5.9M, net_margin=-175.69%, operating_income=-169k, EBITDA=-3.3M, ROA=-0.249, ROE=-1.385, debt/equity=9.46x, current_ratio=0.066 → extreme distress, fails quality test decisively
T+3: Valuation analysis — PE=-0.047 (negative), PB=0.144, EV/EBITDA=-5.69 (negative), FCF_yield=null, ROE=-1.385, ROA=-0.249 → all metrics negative or inverted, not PIT-safe (TTM), fails quality test

T+4: Price action assessment — return_5d_pct=153.4%, return_20d_pct=140.3%, return_60d_pct=160.6%, relative_volume_vs_20d=19.47x, volume=188M (vs avg_20d=9.7M) → extreme spike, requires external corroboration
T+5: Catalyst narrative check — news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable, items_count=0, items_dropped_post_cutoff=20 → no news catalyst available for decision

T+6: Alternative data corroboration — wikipedia_pageviews stable (8-27 views/day, no spike), github_public unmapped, fmp_sentiment all_endpoints_empty, sec_13f not_available_on_current_plan → no alt-data support for price spike
T+7: Information integrity assessment — use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, T3 only (no T1/T2), pollution-defense layer unimplemented, fail-closed per schema v1.1 → blocks primary-signal use
T+8: Sentiment/ownership check — sentiment_community_ownership_evidence.status=not_evaluated, skeleton block, no data available → no sentiment or ownership corroboration
T+9: Narrative price gap check — narrative_price_gap_assessment.status=not_evaluated, agent_internal_pending, no LLM reasoning → cannot triangulate catalyst

T+10: Candidate type evaluation — candidate_type=surge_short requires (1) corroboration of distress (✓ fundamentals extreme), (2) catalyst narrative (✗ news absent), (3) alt-data corroboration (✗ wikipedia flat, sentiment unavailable), (4) no quality support (✓ fails quality test) → corroboration missing on (2) and (3)

T+11: Veto evaluation — insufficient_evidence (narrative_price_gap pending, multiple adapters unavailable), hard_risk_limit_breached (macro regime strict quality, GV fails), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance (news, sentiment, ownership, narrative all absent), information_integrity_veto (T3 only, primary-signal disallowed) → all veto conditions tripped
T+12: Final decision — veto tripped → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0, fail-closed per missing-evidence policy
